messages.body: Subject: Zoca - Darla Michelle Hair Studio - Payment Reminder: November 2025\n\nBody: Hi Darla Gartenfeld , Hope you’re doing well. I am Siranj from the Finance team of Zoca. I’m reaching out to let you know that we have…
You’re welcome :)
Hello Darla,  I tried calling you again, but no luck.   Can we please set up one last meeting to discuss so we can proceed further accordingly?

Hi Monisha thank you so much for all of your assistance. It was a pleasure working with you too. :) We appreciate you taking the time to help us cancel my account. If i ever need Zoca again i will reach out. Take care. :…

Hello Darla,  Thank you for taking the time to speak with me!   As discussed, we will be proceeding with the cancellation of your account, and they will be no further charges!   It was a pleasure working with you :)   Fe…
Sure
Calling you now
Hi Monisha. We can take your call now if you are ready
Hi, this is Darla. Sorry I can't get to the phone right now. Please leave a message after the beep and I'll get back to you.

Hi Darla, Monisha here. How are you? Good. How are you, Monisha? I'm doing great, Darla. First of all, happy Thanksgiving. I hope you have an amazing day. Thank you. You too. Thank you so much. So I just wanted to talk t…
Hello Darla,  Tried calling you however it went to voicemail.   Please text me here once you’re available for a quick call
Hi, this is Darla. Sorry I can't get to the phone right now. Please leave a message.

Hey Darla,  Hope you’re doing well :)  I was sick and unavailable, however, I am back to work now.   I tried calling you, however, it went straight to voicemail. Please text me here once you’re available for a quick call…
Hi, this is Darla. Sorry I can't get to the phone right now. Please leave a message after the beep and I'll get back to you as soon as I can. Thanks, God bless, and have a great day.
No problem. I’ll be available from 9am to 11am Arizona time on Friday
Apologies for the delay  in response.  It would be ideal if we can connect over a call by the end of this week.   Pls let us know, if Thursday works for you
Hi Joe. Im unable to connect over a call this Thursday. Wednesday or Friday could work for me. Let me know
Sure, we'll schedule a call for Friday. Thank you!

Hey Monisha. I tried to cancel my account. I went to Support. Then it said unsubscribe so i tried thar. There was no delete account on my end. However, when i tried to unsubscribe it didn’t allow me because it said that …

Alright Darla,  Please initiate the off-boarding process through the Zoca app -   1. Navigate to “more” from the homepage. 2. Go to “Support” 3. Select “Delete Account”  Please let me know if you need any assistance with…
Darla, please do give it a thought :)   I’m looking forward to a positive response from you!
Hi Monisha. I really appreciate you explaining that, but my mind is made up that i will stop Zoca for now. Thank you so much!
Okay thank you so much Monisha! I will definitely let you know. Thank you for everything. Take care!
You can take 2 days time, I’m ready to help you out financially as well!
Hi, this is Darla. Sorry I can't get to the phone.
Very good. Thank you so much for checking that out for me!
Hey Darla,  Hope you’re doing well!  I noticed there’s a pending payment on your account. Would you like me to send you the payment link?

Hello Darla,  Thanks for letting me know. I completely understand and really appreciate you sharing that with me. Working with you and the team has meant a lot to us, we’ve valued every bit of our partnership with Zoca. …
Hey Monisha. This will be our last payment. We have decided to stop Zoca for now. Thx so much!
No worries at all :)
Hey Darla,  I just checked and these are old leads. Because you haven’t marked the booking status, it still shows up as active leads.   You may mark them not booked or unresponsive accordingly.
Hello Darla,  Hope you’re doing well :)   Apologies for the delayed response. I wasn’t working yesterday.
Do you have any pictures that we could use along with this offer? It would be great to put it up. Just send it across.
Awesome! We could try this out :)
Thx! Julie Ciccarone and Mary Salvati

Hi Monisha!  Happy Monday ! I would like to run a special of 15% off a partial highlight & we can also do  A combination of color and cut and get a free gloss  Do you have any thoughts on this for me?

Cool! I will look to see what I can find. Also, I noticed I had something pop up in the app showing 2 new leads but they seem to be old leads where the women didn’t book with me. Could you check that out for me?
Sure, please give me the names of the clients so I can check
A gloss is a $45 value
Perfect! I’ll be waiting! You have a great weekend too ☺️
Hey Monisha! It was lovely speaking with you as well 😊 I will do that by tomorrow. Thx so much and speak with you next week! Have a great weekend!

Hey Darla!  It was lovely speaking to you both :)  As discussed over our call, please share me the promotions and client data for review automations by tomorrow.   I shall give you a call again next week. Feel free to re…
We're ready if you are

Hello Darla,  Hope you’re doing well :)  This is Monisha, your newly, assigned Growth Manager!   I tried calling you, however, it went straight to voicemail. Just checking in to see how things are going at your end.

Hi Monisha! Thanks so much for reaching out. Marc and I would like to book a call with you if possible. I don't have a lot of availability, but i was thinking that perhaps this Wednesday the 12th could work sometime afte…
Hey Darla,  We could do it over a call as well!  Let me know if you’re available for a quick call now :)
Hi, this is Darla. Sorry I can't get to the phone right now. Please leave a message after the beep and I'll get back to you as soon as I can. Thanks, God bless, and have a great day.
